reviews.review_description: is THis is a Quest 1 or ps1 game.. unimpressive games like this make me think there's real developers making Real games out there ❗❗❗and there the broke underachiever groups that didn't finish college and used their rookie knowledge to make quick cash grabs... good thing this is free... 💯 because this the type if game you buy for $2.99  and still refund it because its Utter 🚮🚮🚮🚮 it deserves its a review score💯💯

Environment, and more importantly the bike controls are really good.
Not sure why, but despite riding through all hoops in the right order, I have no points after about a dozen rides.
